name: dog_activate
description: Toggle the dog's activation state.

dog_id.description: Allowed values: all, dog_1, dog_2, dog_3.

name: dog_backleg_lift
description: Lift one of the dog's back legs.

dog_id.description: Allowed values: all, dog_1, dog_2, dog_3.

name: dog_balance
description: Balance the dog with specific roll and pitch angles.

description: Make the dog draw a circle with its body center while maintaining orientation.

name: get_image
description: Capture an image from the robot's camera. The robot will take a photo and upload it to S3. Returns a presigned URL to view the image, or an error message if the robot did not upload in time.
